address: Arch 5, Forth Street, Newcastle upon Tyne, NE1 3NZ

barbers.name: Dawud
barbers.bio: Founder of DTRHair. Over 8 years of experience crafting precise fades and textured cuts. Specialises in skin fades and bespoke beard grooming.

barbers.name: Tariq
barbers.bio: Renowned for his sharp line-ups and attention to detail. Tariq brings 6 years of experience and a passion for modern barbering techniques.

reviews.name: James M.
reviews.text: Best barbers in Newcastle without a doubt. Dawud takes his time, listens to exactly what you want and delivers every single time. The atmosphere is unreal too.

reviews.name: Ryan T.
reviews.text: Been going to DTRHair for 2 years. The consistency is what gets me — perfect fade every visit. Wouldn't go anywhere else.

reviews.name: Mohammed A.
reviews.text: Tariq is an artist with clippers. Cleanest skin fade I've ever had. The shop itself looks incredible too.

reviews.name: Josh W.
reviews.text: Walked in on a whim and was blown away. Top tier service, great music, proper barbershop vibes. Booked my next appointment before I left.

reviews.name: Tom H.
reviews.text: Can't fault it. Consistently excellent, always on time, and they actually have a conversation with you. My go-to spot in Newcastle.
